ddls:
CREATE TABLE "invoices" (
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invoice */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer associated with the invoice */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order associated with the invoice */,
  "invoice_status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the invoice status (e.g., pending, paid, refunded, disputed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the invoice was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the invoice was last updated */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the invoice */,
  "payment_terms" TEXT /* Payment terms for the invoice (e.g., net 30 days) */,
  "invoice_total" TEXT /* Total amount of the invoice */,
  "tax_total" TEXT /* Total tax amount of the invoice */,
  "shipping_total" TEXT /* Total shipping amount of the invoice */,
  "discount_total" TEXT /* Total discount amount of the invoice */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_invoice_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_status_id") REFERENCES invoice_status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order status (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the order */,
  "shipping_carrier" TEXT /* Shipping carrier used for the order */,
  "shipping_service" TEXT /* Shipping service used for the order */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_order_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_status_id") REFERENCES order_status ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoice_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invoice status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., pending, paid, refunded, disputed) */,
  "status_description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "status_description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoice_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change event */,
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* ID of the invoice that was changed */,
  "changed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the change occurred */,
  "previous_status_id" INTEGER /* Previous status ID of the invoice */,
  "new_status_id" INTEGER /* New status ID of the invoice */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoice_history_invoice_id FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_id") REFERENCES invoices ("invoice_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user role */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* ID of the invoice the payment is for */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method used for the payment */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Transaction ID for the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_invoice_id FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_id") REFERENCES invoices ("invoice_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disputes" (
  "dispute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dispute */,
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* ID of the invoice the dispute is for */,
  "dispute_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the dispute */,
  "resolution_status" TEXT /* Status of the dispute resolution */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the dispute was resolved */,
  "dispute_amount" TEXT /* Amount in dispute */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dispute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disputes_invoice_id FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_id") REFERENCES invoices ("invoice_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "refunds" (
  "refund_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each refund */,
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* ID of the invoice the refund is for */,
  "refund_date" TEXT /* Date when the refund was issued */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the refund */,
  "refund_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the refund */,
  "refund_method" TEXT /* Method used for the refund */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("refund_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_refunds_invoice_id FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_id") REFERENCES invoices ("invoice_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "inventory_count" INTEGER /* Current inventory count of the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_details" (
  "order_detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order detail */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the detail is for */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product in the order */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "unit_price" TEXT /* Unit price of the product */,
  "total_price" TEXT /* Total price of the product in the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_details_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_details_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping" (
  "shipping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping record */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being shipped */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* Name of the shipping carrier */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "ship_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was shipped */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was delivered */,
  "shipping_cost" TEXT /* Cost of shipping */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table affected */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record affected */,
  "changed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the change occurred */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of the changes made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
